# Rekha Makeover Salon

> Premium beauty & bridal makeover salon in Pratap Nagar, Jaipur, India.

## Business
- Name: Rekha Makeover Salon
- Category: Beauty Salon, Bridal Makeup, Hair & Skin Studio
- Location: 101, 74 Kumbha Marg, opposite Navneet Path Lab & Sharma Sweets, Sector 10, Pratap Nagar, Jaipur, Rajasthan 302033, India
- Phone: +91 7014112074
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/917014112074
- Hours: Monday to Sunday, 9:00 AM – 9:00 PM
- Google rating: 4.9 ★ from 473 reviews
- Map: https://maps.app.goo.gl/r1idZLgCNDuiQJvK7

## Services
Bridal Makeup, Airbrush Makeup, Party Makeup, Engagement & Pre-Wedding Makeup,
Haircut & Styling, Hair Spa & Treatments, Hair Color & Makeover,
Facial & Skin Care, Waxing & Hair Removal, Manicure & Pedicure,
Nail Extensions, Eyebrow Threading.

## Areas served
Pratap Nagar, Sector 10, Sector 8, Sector 6, Kumbha Marg, Sanganer,
Tirupati Balaji Nagar and nearby Jaipur localities.
